calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Self-represented Plaintiff Joseph W. Ippolito, appearing on his own behalf. Court ordered case dismissed with prejudice at the request of Plaintiff. Judge: Richard A Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2017 Continued To Jun-13-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400,00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to June 13, 2017 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2016 Continued To Mar-14-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
